name: omnicross
description: Omnicross — a standalone LLM provider-routing / subscription / CLI-launcher serving core.
author: Sayo (https://github.com/Dumoedss)

scripts.build: npm run build -w @omnicross/contracts && npm run build -w @omnicross/core && npm run build -w @omnicross/subscriptions && npm run build -w @omnicross/cli-launcher && npm run build -w @omnicross/daemon && npm run build -w @omnicross/ui
scripts.build:daemon: npm run build -w @omnicross/contracts && npm run build -w @omnicross/core && npm run build -w @omnicross/subscriptions && npm run build -w @omnicross/cli-launcher && npm run build -w @omnicross/daemon
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @omnicross/contracts && npm run typecheck -w @omnicross/core && npm run typecheck -w @omnicross/subscriptions && npm run typecheck -w @omnicross/cli-launcher && npm run typecheck -w @omnicross/daemon && npm run typecheck -w @omnicross/ui
